2603.17715.title: Eye image segmentation using visual and concept prompts with Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3)
2603.17715.paper_summary: Previous work has reported that vision foundation models show promising zero-shot performance in eye image segmentation. Here we examine whether the latest iteration of the Segment Anything Model, SAM3, offers better eye image segmentation performance than SAM2, and explore the performance of its new concept (text) prompting mode. Eye image segmentation performance was evaluated using diverse datasets encompassing both high-resolution high-quality videos from a lab environment and the TEyeD dataset consisting of challenging eye videos acquired in the wild. Results show that in most cases SAM3 with either visual or concept prompts did not perform better than SAM2, for both lab and in-the-wild datasets. Since SAM2 not only performed better but was also faster, we conclude that SAM2 remains the best option for eye image segmentation. We provide our adaptation of SAM3's codebase that allows processing videos of arbitrary duration.
2603.17715.paper_summary_zh: 先前的研究報告顯示，視覺基礎模型在眼部影像分割方面展現出有希望的零樣本表現。<lb/>在此，我們檢視最新版本的Segment Anything Model，SAM3，是否提供比SAM2更好的眼部影像分割表現，並探討其新概念（文本）提示模式的表現。<lb/>眼部影像分割表現是使用多樣化的數據集進行評估，這些數據集包括來自實驗室環境的高解析度高品質視頻以及TEyeD數據集，該數據集由在野外獲取的具有挑戰性的眼部視頻組成。<lb/>結果顯示，在大多數情況下，無論是使用視覺提示還是概念提示的SAM3，在實驗室和野外數據集上均未能表現得比SAM2更好。<lb/>由於SAM2不僅表現更佳而且速度更快，我們得出結論，SAM2仍然是眼部影像分割的最佳選擇。<lb/>我們提供了SAM3代碼庫的適配版本，允許處理任意長度的視頻。
2603.17715.author: Diederick C. Niehorster et.al.
